channel.title: Protein Design Podcast
channel.description: Daily automated digest of protein design, antibody engineering & enzyme design research
channel.itunes:author: Eva Dai
channel.itunes:summary: Daily automated digest of protein design, antibody engineering & enzyme design research

item.title: Daily Podcast 2026-07-24
item.description: The assault on science funding that Derek Lowe highlights isn’t just a headline — it’s reshaping how AI‑driven biology projects get off the ground, forcing teams to stretch limited grants across more ambitious computational pipelines and making every hour of GPU time a strategic trade‑off. | DeorphaNN shows that shift in action for orphan GPCRs. | A similar marriage of prediction and design appears in the work on Photobacterium sp.
item.itunes:author: Eva Dai
item.itunes:summary: The assault on science funding that Derek Lowe highlights isn’t just a headline — it’s reshaping how AI‑driven biology projects get off the ground, forcing teams to stretch limited grants across more ambitious computational pipelines and making every hour of GPU time a strategic trade‑off. | DeorphaNN shows that shift in action for orphan GPCRs. | A similar marriage of prediction and design appears in the work on Photobacterium sp.
